name: collection-mixin-iqueryable
description: Collection mixin PoC complete with two exploration paths. Initial PoC (29 tests) validated IQueryable<T> API. Separate mixin PoC (20 tests) validated Approach B: independent CollectionQueryable mixin. Key findings: (1) CollectionQueryable composes independently or alongside CollectionPersistable, (2) Composition order doesn't matter, (3) Pipeline automation via buildEnhanceCollections works with enableQueryable option, (4) Schema-driven intent via x-persistence.queryable/persistable enables per-model control.
relevantCode: CollectionQueryable mixin: types.model().views(self => ({ query() { return new QueryableBuilder(...) } })). Pipeline: buildEnhanceCollections({ enablePersistence: true, enableQueryable: true }). Schema: x-persistence.queryable controls mixin composition.
recommendation: ADOPT Approach B (Separate CollectionQueryable Mixin). Validated with 49 total tests across 2 PoC files. Implementation: (1) Create CollectionQueryable in composition/queryable.ts, (2) Update buildEnhanceCollections with enableQueryable option (default: true), (3) Add x-persistence.queryable to Enhanced JSON Schema, (4) Update IEnvironment with backendRegistry and queryValidator services.
